Phishing.description: Spearphishing with malicious attachment leading to malware execution

SQL Injection.description: SQL Injection attack on public-facing web application

Brute Force.description: Password brute force attack against authentication systems

Web Shell.description: Web shell deployment after exploiting vulnerable web application

Credential Dumping.description: LSASS memory credential dumping using Mimikatz or similar tools

PowerShell Malware.description: Fileless malware execution via obfuscated PowerShell scripts

Data Exfiltration.description: Sensitive data exfiltration over command and control channel

Lateral Movement.description: Pass-the-Hash lateral movement via SMB and RDP

Scheduled Task.description: Malware persistence via scheduled tasks and registry run keys

DNS Tunneling.description: Command and control communication via DNS tunneling

Drive-by Compromise.description: Drive-by download via malicious or compromised website

RDP Brute Force.description: Remote Desktop Protocol brute force and unauthorized access

Log Tampering.description: Defense evasion via Windows Event Log clearing and security tool disabling
